title: health_ping_returns_service_info
description: GET /api/ping without authentication. Expected: 200 OK with JSON body containing 'service', 'version', 'environment', and 'timestamp' fields. Verify 'service' equals 'TukiFact API' (exact string) and 'version' is a non-empty string.

title: health_check_all_dependencies
description: GET /health without authentication. Expected: 200 OK with JSON body containing 'status' field equal to 'Healthy' and 'checks' array with 3 entries. The check names are lowercase strings: 'postgresql', 'nats', 'minio'. Each check object has 'name' (string), 'status' (string equal to 'Healthy'), 'duration' (number), and 'tags' (array). Verify all 3 checks have status 'Healthy'.

title: auth_register_new_tenant_with_all_fields
description: POST /v1/auth/register without authentication. Send JSON body: {"ruc":"20888999001","razonSocial":"PRD Test Enterprise SAC","nombreComercial":"PRD Test","direccion":"Av Testing 456, Lima","adminEmail":"prdtest@test.pe","adminPassword":"PrdTest2026!","adminFullName":"PRD Admin User"}. Expected: 201 Created with JSON containing 'accessToken' (non-empty string starting with 'eyJ'), 'refreshToken' (non-empty string), and 'user' object with 'email' equal to 'prdtest@test.pe', 'role' equal to 'admin', and 'fullName' equal to 'PRD Admin User'. Save accessToken for TC004.

title: auth_register_duplicate_ruc_returns_409
description: POST /v1/auth/register without authentication. Send JSON body: {"ruc":"20888999001","razonSocial":"Duplicate","adminEmail":"dup@test.pe","adminPassword":"Dup2026!","adminFullName":"Dup"}. This RUC was registered in TC003. Expected: 409 Conflict with JSON containing 'error' field.

title: auth_register_missing_required_fields_returns_400
description: POST /v1/auth/register without authentication. Send JSON body: {"ruc":"20111222333"}. Missing razonSocial, adminEmail, adminPassword, adminFullName. Expected: 400 Bad Request.

title: auth_login_valid_credentials
description: POST /v1/auth/login without authentication. Send JSON body: {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"}. Expected: 200 OK with JSON containing 'accessToken' (non-empty string starting with 'eyJ'), 'refreshToken' (non-empty string), and 'user' object where 'email' equals 'prdtest@test.pe' and 'role' equals 'admin'. IMPORTANT: Save the accessToken and refreshToken — ALL subsequent authenticated tests use this token.

title: auth_login_wrong_password_returns_401
description: POST /v1/auth/login without authentication. Send JSON body: {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"WRONG_PASSWORD_123","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"}. Expected: 401 Unauthorized with JSON containing 'error' field.

title: auth_login_nonexistent_email_returns_401
description: POST /v1/auth/login without authentication. Send JSON body: {"email":"doesnotexist@fake.pe","password":"Whatever2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"}. Expected: 401 Unauthorized.

title: auth_login_wrong_tenantid_returns_401
description: POST /v1/auth/login without authentication. Send JSON body: {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"}. Expected: 401 Unauthorized because user does not belong to that tenant.

title: auth_refresh_token_returns_new_tokens
description: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to obtain refreshToken. Then POST /v1/auth/refresh with {"refreshToken":"{refreshToken_from_login}"}. Expected: 200 OK with new 'accessToken' and 'refreshToken'. Both should be non-empty strings different from the originals.

title: auth_refresh_invalid_token_returns_401
description: POST /v1/auth/refresh without authentication. Send JSON body: {"refreshToken":"invalid-garbage-token-12345"}. Expected: 401 Unauthorized.

title: auth_me_returns_user_info
description: GET /v1/auth/me with Authorization: Bearer {accessToken_from_TC006}. Expected: 200 OK with JSON containing non-null 'userId' (UUID string), 'tenantId' equal to 'b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572', 'email' equal to 'prdtest@test.pe', and 'role' equal to 'admin'.

title: auth_me_no_token_returns_401
description: GET /v1/auth/me WITHOUT any Authorization header. Expected: 401 Unauthorized.

title: auth_forgot_password_always_returns_200
description: POST /v1/auth/forgot-password without authentication. Send JSON body: {"email":"prdtest@test.pe"}. Expected: 200 OK with JSON containing 'message'. Then send again with non-existent email: {"email":"nonexistent@fake.pe"}. Expected: ALSO 200 OK (prevents email enumeration). Both responses must have a 'message' field.

title: auth_reset_password_invalid_token_returns_400
description: POST /v1/auth/reset-password without authentication. Send JSON body: {"token":"fake-invalid-reset-token","newPassword":"NewPass2026!"}. Expected: 400 Bad Request with JSON containing 'error' field.

title: dashboard_returns_complete_kpis
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. GET /v1/dashboard with Bearer token. Expected: 200 OK with JSON containing 'today' object (with numeric 'totalAmount' and 'totalDocuments'), 'thisMonth' object (same structure), 'byType' array (each item has 'type' string and 'count' number), 'byStatus' array (each item has 'status' string and 'count' number), and 'monthlySales' array (each item has 'month' and 'total'). All numeric values must be >= 0.

title: emit_factura_01_with_multiple_items_and_igv
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. POST /v1/documents with Bearer token. Send JSON body: {"documentType":"01","serie":"F001","currency":"PEN","customerDocType":"6","customerDocNumber":"20100070970","customerName":"Cliente Factura SAC","customerAddress":"Av Test 123, Lima","customerEmail":"cliente@test.pe","notes":"Test factura PRD","items":[{"description":"Servicio de consultoría TI","quantity":2,"unitPrice":500.00,"unitMeasure":"ZZ","igvType":"10"},{"description":"Licencia de software anual","quantity":1,"unitPrice":1200.00,"unitMeasure":"NIU","igvType":"10"},{"description":"Capacitación técnica","quantity":3,"unitPrice":150.00,"unitMeasure":"ZZ","igvType":"10","discount":50.00}]}. Expected: 201 Created with JSON containing 'id' (UUID), 'fullNumber' starting with 'F001-', 'documentType' equal to '01', 'status' (any of: 'Accepted','Signed','Sent','Created'), 'items' array with exactly 3 elements, 'subtotal', 'igv', 'total' as numbers > 0. The subtotal should be 2*500 + 1*1200 + (3*150 - 50) = 2600, igv = 468, total = 3068. Save the document 'id' for subsequent tests.

title: emit_boleta_03_with_dni_customer
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. POST /v1/documents with Bearer token. Send JSON body: {"documentType":"03","serie":"B001","currency":"PEN","customerDocType":"1","customerDocNumber":"71234567","customerName":"Juan Pérez López","items":[{"description":"Producto retail A","quantity":5,"unitPrice":25.00,"unitMeasure":"NIU","igvType":"10"},{"description":"Producto retail B","quantity":2,"unitPrice":75.00,"unitMeasure":"NIU","igvType":"10"}]}. Expected: 201 Created with JSON containing 'fullNumber' starting with 'B001-', 'documentType' equal to '03'. Total should be (125 + 150) * 1.18 = 324.50. Save document 'id'.

title: emit_factura_exonerada_igv_type_20
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. POST /v1/documents with Bearer token. Send JSON body: {"documentType":"01","serie":"F001","currency":"PEN","customerDocType":"6","customerDocNumber":"20512345678","customerName":"Exonerado SAC","items":[{"description":"Servicio exonerado de IGV","quantity":1,"unitPrice":1000.00,"unitMeasure":"ZZ","igvType":"20"}]}. Expected: 201 Created. The IGV amount should be 0 because igvType 20 is exonerado. Total should equal subtotal = 1000.00.

title: emit_factura_usd_multimoneda
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. POST /v1/documents with Bearer token. Send JSON body: {"documentType":"01","serie":"F001","currency":"USD","customerDocType":"6","customerDocNumber":"20100070970","customerName":"Cliente USD SAC","items":[{"description":"Servicio internacional","quantity":1,"unitPrice":500.00,"unitMeasure":"ZZ","igvType":"10"}]}. Expected: 201 Created with 'currency' equal to 'USD'. Total should be 590.00 (500 + 90 IGV).

title: emit_document_missing_items_returns_400
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. POST /v1/documents with Bearer token. Send JSON body: {"documentType":"01","serie":"F001","currency":"PEN","customerDocType":"6","customerDocNumber":"20100070970","customerName":"Sin Items","items":[]}. Expected: 400 Bad Request because items array is empty.

title: emit_document_missing_required_fields_returns_400
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. POST /v1/documents with Bearer token. Send incomplete JSON body: {"documentType":"01"}. Expected: 400 Bad Request because serie, customerDocType, customerDocNumber, customerName, and items are required.

title: list_documents_pagination_and_filters
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. GET /v1/documents?page=1&pageSize=5&documentType=01 with Bearer token. Expected: 200 OK with JSON containing 'data' array (max 5 items, each with documentType '01') and 'pagination' object with 'page' equal to 1, 'pageSize' equal to 5, 'totalCount' >= 1, 'totalPages' >= 1. Then GET /v1/documents?page=1&pageSize=5&documentType=03 — verify all items have documentType '03'. Then GET /v1/documents?page=999&pageSize=5 — verify 'data' is an empty array and 'totalPages' > 0. Then GET /v1/documents?page=1&pageSize=2&status=Accepted — verify all items have status 'Accepted'.

title: get_document_by_id_with_items
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. Using the document ID saved from TC017: GET /v1/documents/{id} with Bearer token. Expected: 200 OK with JSON containing 'id' (matching), 'fullNumber' starting with 'F001-', 'documentType' equal to '01', 'customerName' equal to 'Cliente Factura SAC', 'items' array with exactly 3 elements. Each item should have 'description', 'quantity', 'unitPrice', 'igvAmount', 'subtotal', 'total' fields. Verify 'subtotal', 'igv', and 'total' are positive numbers.

title: get_document_404_nonexistent
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. GET /v1/documents/00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000 with Bearer token. Expected: 404 Not Found.

title: download_document_pdf
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. Using the document ID from TC017: GET /v1/documents/{id}/pdf with Bearer token. Expected: 200 OK with Content-Type containing 'application/pdf'. Response body should be binary PDF data (non-empty, first bytes %PDF).

title: download_document_xml
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. Using the document ID from TC017: GET /v1/documents/{id}/xml with Bearer token. Expected: 200 OK with Content-Type containing 'application/xml'. Response body should contain XML content.

title: emit_credit_note_07_full_anulacion
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. Using the document ID from TC017: POST /v1/documents/credit-note with Bearer token. Send JSON body: {"serie":"FC01","referenceDocumentId":"{documentId_from_TC017}","creditNoteReason":"01","description":"Anulación de la operación completa","currency":"PEN","items":[{"description":"Servicio de consultoría TI","quantity":2,"unitPrice":500.00,"unitMeasure":"ZZ","igvType":"10"},{"description":"Licencia de software anual","quantity":1,"unitPrice":1200.00,"unitMeasure":"NIU","igvType":"10"},{"description":"Capacitación técnica","quantity":3,"unitPrice":150.00,"unitMeasure":"ZZ","igvType":"10","discount":50.00}]}. Expected: 201 Created with JSON containing 'fullNumber' starting with 'FC01-', 'documentType' equal to '07'.

title: emit_debit_note_08_penalidad
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. First emit a fresh factura: POST /v1/documents with Bearer token and body {"documentType":"01","serie":"F001","currency":"PEN","customerDocType":"6","customerDocNumber":"20100070970","customerName":"Debit Test SAC","items":[{"description":"Servicio base","quantity":1,"unitPrice":1000.00,"unitMeasure":"ZZ","igvType":"10"}]}. Save the ID. Then POST /v1/documents/debit-note with Bearer token and body: {"serie":"FD01","referenceDocumentId":"{newDocId}","debitNoteReason":"02","description":"Penalidad por atraso","currency":"PEN","items":[{"description":"Penalidad contractual","quantity":1,"unitPrice":200.00,"unitMeasure":"ZZ","igvType":"10"}]}. Expected: 201 Created with JSON containing 'fullNumber' starting with 'FD01-', 'documentType' equal to '08'.

title: void_document_comunicacion_de_baja
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. First emit a new factura: POST /v1/documents with Bearer token and body {"documentType":"01","serie":"F001","currency":"PEN","customerDocType":"6","customerDocNumber":"20100070970","customerName":"Para Anular SAC","items":[{"description":"Item para anular","quantity":1,"unitPrice":100.00,"unitMeasure":"ZZ","igvType":"10"}]}. Save the ID. Then POST /v1/voided-documents with Bearer token and body {"documentId":"{newDocId}","voidReason":"Error en la emisión del comprobante"}. Expected: 201 Created with JSON containing 'ticketNumber' starting with 'RA-', 'status' equal to 'pending'. Save ticketNumber.

title: void_document_already_voided_returns_400
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. Using the same document ID from TC030 (already voided): POST /v1/voided-documents with Bearer token and body {"documentId":"{voidedDocId}","voidReason":"Segundo intento"}. Expected: 400 Bad Request with 'error' containing 'solo se pueden anular documentos aceptados' (case insensitive).

title: list_voided_documents
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. GET /v1/voided-documents with Bearer token. Expected: 200 OK with JSON array. Each element must have 'id' (UUID), 'ticketNumber' (string starting with 'RA-'), 'status' (string), 'createdAt' (ISO date string). Array should have at least 1 item (from TC030).

title: despatch_advice_create_draft_gre_remitente
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. POST /v1/despatch-advices with Bearer token. Send JSON body: {"documentType":"09","serie":"T001","transferStartDate":"2026-04-15","transferReasonCode":"01","transferReasonDescription":"Venta de mercadería","grossWeight":150.5,"weightUnitCode":"KGM","totalPackages":3,"transportMode":"01","carrierDocType":"6","carrierDocNumber":"20123456789","carrierName":"Transportes Perú SAC","carrierMtcNumber":"MTC-12345","recipientDocType":"6","recipientDocNumber":"20100070970","recipientName":"Destinatario SAC","originUbigeo":"150101","originAddress":"Av. Origen 100, Lima","destinationUbigeo":"040101","destinationAddress":"Calle Destino 200, Arequipa","relatedDocType":"01","relatedDocNumber":"F001-00000001","items":[{"description":"Caja de productos electrónicos","productCode":"ELEC-001","quantity":10,"unitCode":"NIU"},{"description":"Pallet de alimentos","productCode":"FOOD-002","quantity":5,"unitCode":"KGM"}]}. Expected: 201 Created with JSON containing 'id' (UUID), 'fullNumber' starting with 'T001-', 'status'. Save the GRE 'id' for TC034.

title: despatch_advice_emit_sign_send_sunat
description: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. STEP 1: Create a NEW despatch advice draft first: POST /v1/despatch-advices with body: {"shipmentType":"remitente","transferStartDate":"2026-04-20","carrier":{"docType":"6","docNumber":"20888999001","name":"Transportes SAC"},"departure":{"ubigeo":"150101","address":"Av Lima 123"},"arrival":{"ubigeo":"040101","address":"Av Arequipa 456"},"items":[{"description":"Producto test","quantity":5,"unitMeasure":"NIU","weight":2.5}]}. Expected 201 with an 'id' field. STEP 2: POST /v1/despatch-advices/{id}/emit with Bearer token. NOTE: If certificate is not configured, the API may return an error about signing — that is EXPECTED and the test should PASS if it gets either 200/201 (signed+sent) OR 400/422 with a certificate/signing error. The test validates the emit endpoint exists and processes the request.

title: despatch_advice_get_by_id
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. Using the GRE ID from TC033: GET /v1/despatch-advices/{id} with Bearer token. Expected: 200 OK with JSON containing 'fullNumber' starting with 'T001-', 'documentType' equal to '09', 'transferReasonCode' equal to '01', 'recipientName' equal to 'Destinatario SAC', 'items' array with 2 elements, 'originAddress', 'destinationAddress'.

title: despatch_advice_list_with_pagination
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. GET /v1/despatch-advices?page=1&pageSize=10 with Bearer token. Expected: 200 OK with JSON containing 'data' array and 'pagination' object with 'page', 'pageSize', 'totalCount', 'totalPages'. Array should have at least 1 item (from TC033).

title: despatch_advice_create_transporte_privado
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. POST /v1/despatch-advices with Bearer token. Send JSON body: {"documentType":"09","serie":"T001","transferStartDate":"2026-04-16","transferReasonCode":"04","transferReasonDescription":"Traslado entre establecimientos","grossWeight":50.0,"weightUnitCode":"KGM","totalPackages":1,"transportMode":"02","driverDocType":"1","driverDocNumber":"71234567","driverName":"Carlos Pérez","driverLicense":"Q71234567","vehiclePlate":"ABC-123","recipientDocType":"6","recipientDocNumber":"20100070970","recipientName":"Sucursal SAC","originUbigeo":"150101","originAddress":"Local Principal Lima","destinationUbigeo":"040101","destinationAddress":"Sucursal Arequipa","items":[{"description":"Mercadería interna","quantity":20,"unitCode":"NIU"}]}. Expected: 201 Created with 'transportMode' reflected and driver info present.

title: customers_create_ruc_customer
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. POST /v1/customers with Bearer token. Send JSON body: {"docType":"6","docNumber":"20567890123","name":"Cliente Empresa SAC","email":"empresa@test.pe","phone":"01-2345678","address":"Av Cliente 789, Lima","ubigeo":"150101","departamento":"Lima","provincia":"Lima","distrito":"Lima","category":"frecuente","notes":"Cliente de prueba PRD"}. Expected: 201 Created with JSON containing 'id' (UUID), 'docNumber' equal to '20567890123', 'name'. Save customer 'id'.

title: customers_create_duplicate_returns_409
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. POST /v1/customers with Bearer token. Send same body as TC038: {"docType":"6","docNumber":"20567890123","name":"Duplicado"}. Expected: 409 Conflict with 'error' containing 'ya existe'.

title: customers_create_dni_customer
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. POST /v1/customers with Bearer token. Send JSON body: {"docType":"1","docNumber":"71234568","name":"María López García","email":"maria@test.pe","phone":"999888777","category":"nuevo"}. Expected: 201 Created. Save customer 'id'.

title: customers_list_with_search_and_filters
description: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. STEP 1: Create 2 customers first. POST /v1/customers with {"docType":"1","docNumber":"71234501","name":"DNI Customer Test 1","email":"dni1@test.pe"}. POST /v1/customers with {"docType":"6","docNumber":"20100000501","name":"RUC Customer Test 1","email":"ruc1@test.pe"}. STEP 2: GET /v1/customers?page=1&pageSize=10 with Bearer token. Expected: 200 OK with 'data' array containing at least 2 customers and 'pagination' object. STEP 3: GET /v1/customers?docType=1 — verify returns at least 1 customer with docType=1. STEP 4: GET /v1/customers?search=DNI+Customer — verify returns at least 1 result.

title: customers_get_by_id
description: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. STEP 1: Create a customer first: POST /v1/customers with {"docType":"6","docNumber":"20000000042","name":"Get By ID Test Customer","email":"getbyid@test.pe"}. Save the 'id' from the 201 response. STEP 2: GET /v1/customers/{id} with Bearer token. Expected: 200 OK with JSON containing 'id', 'docType'='6', 'docNumber', 'name'='Get By ID Test Customer'. Verify all fields match what was sent in creation.

title: customers_search_by_doc_number
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. GET /v1/customers/search?docNumber=20567890123 with Bearer token. title: customers_update

description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. POST /v1/webhooks with Bearer token. Send body: {"url":"https://httpbin.org/post","events":["document.created","document.accepted"],"maxRetries":3}. Expected: 201 with 'id' and 'secret'. Save ID. Then GET /v1/webhooks — verify list contains new webhook. Then PUT /v1/webhooks/{id} with {"isActive":false}. Expected: 204. Then GET /v1/webhooks/{id}/deliveries. Expected: 200 with array. Then DELETE /v1/webhooks/{id}. Expected: 204.

title: tenant_get_and_update
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. GET /v1/tenant with Bearer token. Expected: 200 OK with 'ruc'. Then PUT /v1/tenant with body: {"nombreComercial":"PRD Updated","direccion":"Av PRD 2026"}. Expected: 204. Then GET /v1/tenant — verify updated values.

title: plans_list_public
description: GET /v1/plans without authentication. Expected: 200 OK with JSON array of at least 6 plans. Each has 'name', 'priceMonthly', 'maxDocumentsPerMonth', 'features'.

title: audit_log_pagination_and_filter
description: AUTHENTICATION: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. GET /v1/audit-log?page=1&pageSize=10 with Bearer token. Expected: 200 OK with 'data' array and 'pagination' with 'totalCount' >= 1. Then GET /v1/audit-log?entityType=Documents&page=1&pageSize=5. Expected: 200 with filtered results.

title: catalogs_list_sunat
description: First POST /v1/auth/login with {"email":"prdtest@test.pe","password":"PrdTest2026!","tenantId":"b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. GET /v1/catalogs with Bearer token. Expected: 200 OK with JSON. The response may be an object with catalog keys or an array. Verify the response is not empty and contains SUNAT catalog data. Check for common catalogs like document types or IGV types. Do NOT assume a specific field name — check what the API actually returns and validate it has meaningful data (arrays or objects with entries).

title: backoffice_auth_login_superadmin
description: POST /v1/backoffice/auth/login without authentication. Send JSON body: {"email":"superadmin@tukifact.net.pe","password":"SuperAdmin2026!"}. Expected: 200 OK with JSON containing 'accessToken' (non-empty, starts with 'eyJ'), 'user' object with 'role' equal to 'superadmin'. Save accessToken as BACKOFFICE_TOKEN for TC088-TC099.

title: backoffice_dashboard_global_metrics
description: GET /v1/backoffice/dashboard with Bearer BACKOFFICE_TOKEN. Expected: 200 OK with JSON containing 'totalTenants' (number >= 1), 'activeTenants', 'suspendedTenants', 'totalUsers', 'totalDocuments', 'todayDocuments', 'monthDocuments', 'recentTenants' array (max 5), 'tenantsByPlan' array.

title: backoffice_list_tenants_with_search
description: GET /v1/backoffice/tenants?page=1&pageSize=10 with Bearer BACKOFFICE_TOKEN. Expected: 200 OK with 'data' array and 'pagination'. Each tenant has 'id', 'ruc', 'razonSocial', 'isActive', 'plan', 'usersCount', 'documentsCount'. Then GET /v1/backoffice/tenants?search=20100070970 — verify filtered by RUC.

title: backoffice_get_tenant_detail
description: GET /v1/backoffice/tenants/{tenantId} with Bearer BACKOFFICE_TOKEN using tenantId 'b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572'. Expected: 200 OK with JSON containing 'ruc', 'razonSocial', 'isActive', 'plan' object, 'users' array (at least 1), 'stats' object with 'totalDocuments' and 'monthDocuments'.

title: backoffice_suspend_and_activate_tenant
description: First register a throwaway tenant: POST /v1/auth/register with {"ruc":"20999888001","razonSocial":"Suspend Test SAC","adminEmail":"suspend@test.pe","adminPassword":"Suspend2026!","adminFullName":"Suspend User"}. Get the tenantId from the response. Then PUT /v1/backoffice/tenants/{tenantId}/suspend with BACKOFFICE_TOKEN. Expected: 200 OK with 'message' containing 'suspendido'. Then PUT /v1/backoffice/tenants/{tenantId}/activate with BACKOFFICE_TOKEN. Expected: 200 OK with 'message' containing 'activado'.

title: backoffice_change_tenant_plan
description: First GET /v1/plans to get a plan ID (pick the second plan, not Free). Then PUT /v1/backoffice/tenants/{tenantId}/plan with BACKOFFICE_TOKEN and body: {"planId":"{selectedPlanId}"}. Expected: 200 OK with 'message' containing 'Plan cambiado'.

title: backoffice_search_documents_cross_tenant
description: GET /v1/backoffice/documents?ruc=20100070970&page=1&pageSize=5 with BACKOFFICE_TOKEN. Expected: 200 OK with 'data' array and 'pagination'. Each document has 'tenantId', 'documentType', 'fullNumber', 'total', 'status'. Then GET /v1/backoffice/documents?serie=F001 — verify filtered results.

title: backoffice_employees_list
description: GET /v1/backoffice/employees with BACKOFFICE_TOKEN. Expected: 200 OK with JSON array. At least 1 employee (superadmin). Each has 'id', 'email', 'fullName', 'role', 'isActive'.

title: backoffice_employees_crud
description: POST /v1/backoffice/employees with BACKOFFICE_TOKEN. Send body: {"email":"support_prd@tukifact.net.pe","fullName":"Soporte PRD","password":"Support2026!","role":"support"}. Expected: 201 Created. Save employee 'id'. Then PUT /v1/backoffice/employees/{id} with body: {"fullName":"Soporte PRD Updated"}. Expected: 200. Then PUT /v1/backoffice/employees/{id}/role with body: {"role":"ops"}. Expected: 200. Then DELETE /v1/backoffice/employees/{id}. Expected: 200 with 'message' containing 'desactivado'.

title: backoffice_employees_invalid_role_returns_400
description: POST /v1/backoffice/employees with BACKOFFICE_TOKEN. Send body: {"email":"bad@tukifact.net.pe","fullName":"Bad","password":"Bad2026!","role":"admin"}. Expected: 400 Bad Request because 'admin' is not a valid platform role (valid: superadmin, support, ops, billing).

title: backoffice_impersonate_tenant
description: POST /v1/backoffice/tenants/{tenantId}/impersonate with BACKOFFICE_TOKEN using tenantId 'b2ba4cad-45c9-4a98-96f9-bf2eb6c96572'. Expected: 200 OK with JSON containing 'tenantId', 'tenantName', 'tenantRuc', 'impersonating' equal to true, 'expiresAt' (future date), 'redirectUrl'.

title: backoffice_reports_mrr_and_usage
description: GET /v1/backoffice/reports/mrr with BACKOFFICE_TOKEN. Expected: 200 OK with 'totalMrr' (number), 'mrrByPlan' array, 'activeTenantCount'. Then GET /v1/backoffice/reports/usage. Expected: 200 OK with 'todayDocs', 'weekDocs', 'monthDocs', 'topTenants' array, 'byType' array.

title: backoffice_config_get_and_update
description: GET /v1/backoffice/config with BACKOFFICE_TOKEN. Expected: 200 OK with JSON containing 'maintenance_mode', 'registration_enabled', 'default_plan', 'max_free_documents', 'trial_days', 'sunat_beta_mode', 'email_provider', 'support_email'. Then PUT /v1/backoffice/config with BACKOFFICE_TOKEN and body: {"trial_days":"30","support_email":"soporte-prd@tukifact.net.pe"}. Expected: 200 OK with 'message' containing 'actualizada'. Then GET /v1/backoffice/config — verify 'trial_days' equals '30'.

title: backoffice_activity_log
description: First POST /v1/backoffice/auth/login with {"email":"superadmin@tukifact.net.pe","password":"SuperAdmin2026!"} to get accessToken. Use Bearer token for all subsequent requests. GET /v1/backoffice/activity?page=1&pageSize=10 with Bearer token. Expected: 200 OK. If the endpoint returns 404, the test should note that the activity log endpoint may not be implemented yet and PASS with a warning. If 200, verify response has 'data' array and 'pagination'. Each log entry should have 'id', 'action', 'createdAt' fields.
